widget_id: Name of Maine or Foreign Limited Liability Company
label_verbatim: (Name of Maine or Foreign Limited Liability Company)
rationale: Top-of-form LLC name. Form serves both Maine domestic and foreign LLCs from a single 'entity.name' widget — the FIRST jurisdiction block disambiguates. Same approach as sister-form CORP_MBCA-13A and LP_MLPA-13A.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The jurisdiction of its organization is
rationale: State or country of organization (for a domestic LLC, 'Maine'; for a foreign LLC, the home jurisdiction). Same key family as MLLC-12, MBCA-12, MBCA-13A, LP_MLPA-13A — the universal 'home jurisdiction' primitive that works for both domestic and foreign filings. (Drafter initially proposed entity.jurisdiction_of_organization; corrected during review per established convention.)

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date the current year's annual report was filed
rationale: Date the original annual report (the one being amended) was filed with SOS. Anchor for the §1666 amendment-window check. Same key as CORP_MBCA-13A and LP_MLPA-13A.

widget_id: The information that has changed attach additional pages if necessary 1
label_verbatim: THIRD: The information that has changed (attach additional pages, if necessary): line 1
rationale: Multi-line text widget for the substantive change description. Indexed line1–line6 mirroring the LP_MLPA-13A / CORP_MBCA-13A amendment.changes_description.lineN pattern (which use 8 and 4 lines respectively). MLLC-13A has 6 inline lines; overflow goes to attached additional pages. (Drafter initially proposed amendment.changes_description_N with underscore; corrected to dotted .lineN per existing convention.)

widget_id: The information that has changed attach additional pages if necessary 2
The information that has changed attach additional pages if necessary 3
The information that has changed attach additional pages if necessary 4
The information that has changed attach additional pages if necessary 5
The information that has changed attach additional pages if necessary 6
rationale: THIRD line 6 (bottom). Attach additional pages if more than 6 lines needed.

widget_id: The date this information changed is
label_verbatim: FOURTH: The date this information changed is
rationale: Date on which the reported changes actually occurred (the operative date of the underlying change). Same key as CORP_MBCA-13A and LP_MLPA-13A; canonical amendment.effective_date primitive. (Drafter initially proposed amendment.effective_date_of_change; corrected during review.)
Date the amended annual report was signed.

widget_id: type or print name and capacity
rationale: First authorized signer (Shape D — combined name+capacity, paired with a wet-ink (signature) line that has no AcroForm widget). Statute (§1676.1B) requires at least one; this slot is required. Same indexed pattern as LLC_MLLC-15.

widget_id: type or print name and capacity_2
rationale: Second authorized signer (Shape D). Statute (§1676.1B) only mandates one signer; this second slot is optional and used when the LLC's operating agreement calls for dual authorization.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees plus expedite premium ($85 domestic / $150 foreign base; $50 for 24h, $100 for immediate).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)

rationale: Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
